title: Fix WebSocket clean shutdown — complete inbound channel on all terminal paths
description:
From sprint35_audit finding 5 (88% confidence): The background receive loop exits cleanly when the websocket closes normally, but the inbound channel is only completed after all reconnect retries fail. This makes shutdown semantics asymmetric — clean disconnects can leave readers suspended.

Fix: Complete the inbound channel on ALL terminal paths (normal close, error, cancellation), not only on retry exhaustion.

Source: sprint35_audit (Finding 5)
